primary_sources.name: CMS ESRD Quality Incentive Program
primary_sources.relevance: Defines QIP compliance requirements and quality measures for ESRD facilities

primary_sources.name: KDIGO Clinical Practice Guideline for the Care of Kidney Transplant Recipients
primary_sources.relevance: Includes quality improvement recommendations for transplant care delivery

primary_sources.name: NKF KDOQI Clinical Practice Guidelines and Clinical Practice Recommendations for Anemia in Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Provides quality indicators and improvement strategies for anemia management

primary_sources.name: Quality improvement in nephrology: Core Curriculum 2019
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive review of QI methodologies including PDSA cycles and KPI development in nephrology

secondary_sources.name: Institute for Healthcare Improvement Model for Improvement
secondary_sources.relevance: General framework for PDSA cycles and quality improvement methodology

gaps: Limited recent nephrology-specific guidance on root cause analysis methodologies
Lack of standardized KPI frameworks specifically for outpatient nephrology practices
